hero.alt: AI Appointment Scheduling Dashboard showing automated scheduling and calendar management

useCases.alt: AI Customer Service Agent in action

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Hello! Thank you for contacting PrimeNest Realty Support. I’m here to help you 24/7. How can I assist you today?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: Hi, my maintenance request hasn’t been resolved yet, and I also want some information about buying a flat in this building.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: I’m sorry for the inconvenience. I can help with both. Let’s start with the maintenance issue. Could you please share your apartment number?

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Thank you. Please give me a moment while I check the details.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: I see a request logged for water leakage in the kitchen sink, submitted three days ago. Is the issue still ongoing?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: Yes, it’s still leaking, and the cabinet below the sink is getting damaged.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Thank you for letting me know. I’m marking this as a high-priority issue and escalating it now. I’ll arrange a technician visit within the next 12 hours. Would tomorrow morning work for you?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: Yes, tomorrow morning is fine.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Perfect. I’ve scheduled the technician between 9:00 and 11:00 AM tomorrow. You’ll receive a confirmation message shortly.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Now, regarding buying a flat—are you looking for a specific configuration?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: I’m interested in a 2 BHK, mainly as an investment.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: That’s a great option. Currently, 2 BHK units in this building are priced between ₹82 and ₹90 lakhs, with strong rental demand. May I know if you’d like details on rental income, availability, or a property tour?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: I’d like to know about rental income and also arrange a virtual tour.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Certainly. A 2 BHK here typically earns between ₹32,000 and ₹36,000 per month in rent, with steady appreciation. I can schedule a virtual tour for you. Does tomorrow at 5:00 PM work?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: Yes, that works.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Great. Your virtual tour is scheduled for tomorrow at 5:00 PM. You’ll receive the tour link and details via WhatsApp and email.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Would you also like to speak with a senior property consultant for investment guidance and financing options?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: Yes, that would be helpful.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: I’ve arranged that for you. A senior consultant will contact you within 24 hours and will already have the context of our conversation.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Is there anything else I can assist you with today?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: No, that’s all. Thank you for the help.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: You’re very welcome. I’ll keep track of your maintenance request and ensure everything is handled smoothly. Have a great day!
